items.title: Controlled Card Expansion Initiative
items.description: Planned investment to expand strategic-account card adoption through stronger controls and cleaner onboarding.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Maintain reconciliation quality as card adoption expands.

businessKPIs.kpi: Card attach in managed spend accounts
businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase card workflow penetration in strategic accounts.

productBricks.change: Improve cardholder onboarding and program setup.
Improve reconciliation durability at higher transaction volumes.

items.title: Travel Supplier Intelligence Initiative
items.description: Planned investment to improve route, merchant, and supplier insight for procurement-led travel programs.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase compliant use of preferred suppliers.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase governed travel volume through better steering.

productBricks.change: Improve supplier, route, and team-level dashboards.
Improve leakage detection for supplier drift.

deliveryChannels.change: Release improved supplier and route dashboards.
